item.title: Kareem Abdul-Jabbar sold his 4 championship rings, 3 MVP Trophies and other memorabilia for 2.8 million dollars with the proceeds going to a youth education program.
item.description: When asked why, the hall of famer said, “when it comes to choosing between storing a championship ring or trophy in a room, or providing kids with an opportunity to change their lives, the choice is pretty simple: Sell it all.”
item.dc:creator: trustfallaccident

item.title: The Top 10 Comics of the Year (So Far) ?
item.description:
It is the exact half of the year. That means the days are getting shorter again and we're naming the best comics of the year so far! Which was your favourite?
If you'd like to join us through the second half of the year as a confidant, consider becoming a supporter on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas

item.title: The 452nd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Bonus - Trans Support Tuesday!
item.description:
This week I am promoting an online friend's Twitch Stream and Cat Surgery Fundraiser again @ElbowDeepInPackages (Amazon shipments, not genitals) Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/erosrogziel She will be streaming, but for a few weeks it will be unpredictable because of her work schedule. Times: Either 1pm-ish or 7 pm-ish start times. Games: Valorant, Risk Of Rain 2, Brawlhalla; maybe Terraria and Stardew Valley https://imgur.com/gallery/kZDYAFm The Cat appointment is set for July 9th, and the consult appointment alone costs $180. There will be HUGE additional casts for the procedure itself. Ko-FI: https://ko-fi.com/erosrogziel Please give whatever you can to help this kitty!
@KickingAndScreaming I hope you're doing OK!
Bluh-Hai
Yes
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays.
Yup
Armed Queers Bash Back!
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales

item.title: User-make Follow-up on 3D Print of Spiral Cone Fidget Thingy
item.description:
Hey y’all … this post is a follow-up to this video (shown above) posted by Pasquinel last week: https://imgur.com/gallery/mcrhfNV
Several Imgurians inquired about where to find the STL files so they could 3D print their own spiral cones. I scanned the Internet and found many dead links and several models that had parts that would not fit together when I tested them in my modeling software. Depending on their size and your print speed, these models could take many days to print and up to 100 meters of filament, so it is definitely prudent to test the designs first. I finally found a spiral cone model (set) on Thingiverse that passed my test (shown above) for proper fit.
I promised to run a 3D print using glow PETG, and report back with a video of the results and a link to the maker of the original design if all went well. ***** WARNING: LOTS OF DETAILS BELOW. SKIP IF READING LOTS OF DETAILS BUGS YOU!! ***** There are two components, as shown above: an inner cone and an outer cone. These models are rather large at approx. 80mm dia by 110mm height. I recommend printing each component separately — meaning with only one part on your build plate at a time. PETG was my choice of print material (filament) as there are fine structures, particularly at the tips of the outer cone (shown on the right) that are fragile. The most common filament type — PLA — prints with the least complications, but can be very brittle. PETG has a much higher “elongation at break” score that makes it much more flexible and ductile than PLA. Also, PETG has better “heat deflection”, which can tolerate up to 70-80 deg C without deforming compared to 50-55 deg C for PLA. Also, PETG can be produced with higher translucence, which is a plus when glow material is added, and it has a lower “surface tension” (more slippery finish) that is ideal for parts that have to slide, such as these inter-locking, spiral cones. The downsides are that PETG filament is much more hygroscopic than PLA, and needs to be dried to reduce its moisture content before printing. I used blue glow PETG for the inner cone, and green glow PETG for the outer cone, and had both spools of filament in the dryer at 55 deg C for 16 hours each, at the same time, before printing. The filament maker is SainSmart. Also. I have found that PETG prints much more cleanly (with the least stringing and blobbing) at much slower print speeds. I opted for 20 mm/s which is slow as heck. Each component took about 36 hours to print (with 100% infill), which is agonizingly slow, but the results, which were very clean and crisp, and which required almost no post-processing, were well worth it. I purposely chose to use a common, affordable, 3D printer (the Creality Ender 3 v2 Neo which you can buy for $230 new) and the most bare-bones slicer (the Creality Cloud slicer which is loosely based on Cura and can be run from Creality’s Internet cloud website, from your mobile device, for free). I’ve always contended that you can get surprisingly accurate and precise 3D prints from a low-cost printer and basic, no-frills slicer whenever the design (of the 3D model) is good. I did upgrade the nozzle on the Ender 3 v2 Neo with a diamond nozzle by Sidewinder, though. This, because the glow filament contains ceramic particles of strontium aluminate that will absolutely eat up (wear out) brass and copper nozzles and even the steel ones that are not hardened. The $90 cost of the diamond nozzle is well worth not having to hassle with changing out nozzles every time you want to print with abrasive filaments. Fun trivia: Sidewinder is now owned by Champion, the spark plug manufacturing company. So, enough of my blabbing on the details. Let’s see the results …
Not bad!! I’d like to point out that no supports are needed for these prints. The designer did a great job to keep all over-hanging inclines at 45 to 66 degrees.
Here’s the blue and green glow components being fidgeted with in lower light. And now for the sauce: The designer is Mixaprinter. His “Spiral Cone Fidget Toy” STL files can be downloaded from here: https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:6613158#google_vignette Print yours today! :)

item.title: "We will teach it to them again."
item.description: Source: Babylon 5 The world may feel like too much. There are a demographic of people that want you burnt out, numb, apathetic, broken, and helpless. But you aren't, there are no small parts. You do your best, whatever that is. You fight, you endure, you continue. You plant that tree knowing full well under it's shade you will not sit. If Gene Roddenberry's vision for the future was Star Trek. Then J. Michael Straczynski's Babylon 5 is the work we have to do to get there. For the people going to ask me can I win? "Every time I say no."
item.dc:creator: DemonKysho

item.title: A dump as I scream into the void…
item.description:
So my GF and I decided to move across the country after she graduated
She had a big girl job lined up thanks to her fancy new degree
And I was looking forward to having some time to chase my dreams after helping her achieve hers
Without boring you with all the details, it didn’t work out…
She fell out of love with me somewhere along the line, broke up with me to hook up with a stranger on her birthday, then wanted to get back together and try to make it work… after 8 months of trying to find the spark again, I said enough is enough
So I left because I couldn’t afford a place on my own, and hadn’t made any friends close enough to want to live with in Oregon
Now I’m back in the shithole that is Florida, and starting all over… again… at 35
This will probably die in user sub, and I don’t know what I’m even trying to accomplish besides screaming into the void but…
At least memes are still funny, music is still pretty, and my room has AC
Just really not looking forward to the next 8-9 months
That’s how long I expect to live… I’ve joked about dying at 35 since I was 12, and honestly it doesn’t seem like such a bad idea anymore
Honesty the only thing that keeps me going most days is guilt… my mom doesn’t deserve that kind of pain in her life
Then again, she and I had lunch last week and instead of wanting to talk to me about how I’m faring after the breakup, all she could do was remind me of how I need to start making money again asap and get my finances together
Thanks… I’m aware that my life is royally fucked financially too mom… but right now I’m still trying to process the loss of a partner of 5 years, and figure out how to get out of bed each morning… but I’ll get right on the money thing too
Anyway. I also had a moment of weakness and texted my ex from before this relationship just to see how life was treating her
She was always “the one that got away” in my head, so… fuck it, I’m single right?
Well, turns out she’s happily engaged now, so??‍♂️ oh well But I am happy for her, she deserves someone awesome and I hope she found them
Now I’m hiding in my room because my roomie/landlord’s parent are in town for 2 weeks and I don’t have the social/emotional bandwidth to deal with that many people right now
Any ideas for new/easy jobs in Florida or remote? At least then I can make my mom happy
I’ll probably just lose 30lbs, get a spray tan, and start an onlyfans… but who would pay to watch a 35 year old guy get naked? Maybe naked and playing guitar? Idk
Anyway… this is my scream into the void, and if you made it this far, thanks for reading my rant
I hope life is kind to you, and I hope you always feel loved and appreciated
Remember, it’s better to be kind than to be right.
Cat tax… I miss them so much, and I hate being back in Florida Mv edit: thanks for the kind words everybody… I’ve never been on most viral before, I’ve been a lurker for years and decided to post because I was losing my shit today… anyway if you’re bored and want to help, give my music a listen? https://open.spotify.com/artist/0eRIeeHfNyeE7Bb3sVlhWV?si=51AihVhJR2-6PpeW9yTa9w Spotify won’t pay anything really, but it helps to book gigs if your songs have more listens :/ and I just recorded some new stuff coming out soon And if you’re feeling really kooky/generous you can buy the songs on iTunes or something and I’ll actually see some of the money from it :P https://music.apple.com/us/artist/trevor-beauvois/1484755361 but no pressure… shits expensive these days and we’re all struggling to get by… especially artists. Anyway, I love you all. Try not to take life too seriously… nobody gets out alive<3
item.dc:creator: TrevoriusRex

item.title: Things seen this week during structural assessments!
item.description:
The land in Rancho Palos Verdes has been sliding for decades, but it is now moving quicker than ever. Portuguese Bend, an area in Rancho Palos Verdes, is currently shifting at a rate of 7 to 12 inches per week and threatening numerous neighborhoods.
This home had no issues earlier this year, but as the land has continued to sink, extraordinary measures have been taken. Stairs, which were previously unnecessary, were added to the front door to enter the house.
The land movement has now exposed the foundation.
The ground in this area has dropped around 5-6 feet in just a few months.
The shifting ground has compelled Rancho Palos Verdes to impose a prohibition on 2-wheel vehicles in other areas like Palos Verdes Drive South roadway for at least six months until movement rates can be significantly reduced.
This was once a much flatter driveway. The homeowner has been climbing a rope to get into the home due to the drastic change in elevation.
Land movement isn’t a new phenomenon on the Palos Verdes Peninsula. However, the shifting has not only accelerated but has also begun to cause damage to additional areas. Their water main is now above ground, with flex connections added to accommodate future expected ground movement.
This foundation is severely damaged and needs to be demolished and replaced. The extensive damage compromises the structural integrity of the home, making it essential to address the issue promptly to ensure safety and stability.
This block wall, which supports the neighboring home situated on the hill, is failing and leaning into the adjacent property. The deterioration of this wall jeopardizes the structural stability of the neighboring home and presents a significant risk to both properties. Thank you for joining us, we hope you enjoyed! Check out our Instagram for more exciting content, and we'll see you next Tuesday at 2 pm! https://www.instagram.com/alphastructural/
item.dc:creator: AlphaStructural

item.description: More hours for my co-workers, not me. Butcher of 14 years and 7 year manager... "Make it work" they say.
item.dc:creator: lsybarra

item.title: I'm a park ranger in Colorado, and I'm a filthy hypocrite.
item.description:
I'm sorry, I know we're not supposed to mess with them, I know I know. But I watched this little guy's mom get eaten by a hawk this evening, and he came trundling out of the bushes peeping and trying to hide under my shoe. I couldn't just leave him there! I'm keeping him alive through the night and then I'm taking him to a wildlife rescue in the morning.
Everyday here is beautiful in its own way, I'm always thankful for the interesting life experiences.
We had a wonderful year for snow here, and therefore we are now having a wonderful flush of wildflowers. This one here only grows out of rock crevices and has the splendid name of telesonix
Glorious Bluebell
Cheerful Black-Eyed susans
Weidemeyer’s Admiral
Anyway, little guy is hydrated from a syringe, he gratefully ate a few slivers of grape, and he's peacefully sleeping in an old hat. Chipmunks are so cute, but it's illegal to keep them as pets, not to mention they are super high maintenance at this age. I'm just hoping I can keep him alive through the night. Wish me luck everyone!
item.dc:creator: noproblllama

item.dc:creator: gardenofhearts52

item.title: My heart is breaking…
item.description: My sweet little Ellie got diagnosed with bobcat fever this morning. It’s fatal and very very painful in its end stages. All I can do is try to make her comfortable and happy until the painful stage hits and then have her put down. It really sucks being so soft hearted, it hurts so bad. I’ve been using the kittens to distract myself from my own sucky health situation and the anxiety it causes. Now my distractions just add to my worry. Why cant life just quit kicking me for a couple days?
item.dc:creator: robertthredalso
